bio_text: Based on the Kāpiti Coast and working with clients throughout New Zealand, Melissa is easy to work with, realistic about pricing, and always keen to hear about the next project. Get in touch — she'd love to help bring your project to life.

slideshow.label: Immersive Marketing
slideshow.description: Sell new builds just like a real estate listing.

slideshow.label: Virtual Show Homes
slideshow.description: Expand your customer base beyond a physical location.

slideshow.label: Complete Design
slideshow.description: Present full 3D exterior & interior design concepts.

slideshow.label: Actual Materials
slideshow.description: Explore multiple design options before building begins.

slideshow.label: On Demand
slideshow.description: Renders when you need them, without the hiring process.
